resources.string: This demo app shows how to integrate LivePerson messaging with both visitor (unauthenticated) and signed-in (authenticated) conversations.
Use the first button for a visitor (UN_AUTH) chat. Use the second for AUTH after Okta sign-in (configure Client ID and issuer in Settings).

Okta token error (invalid_client): In Okta Admin, use an OIDC application type Native (or SPA with PKCE), not Web. Web apps expect a client secret; this app cannot send one. Ensure the Client ID is from that app, grant type includes Authorization Code, and the Sign-in redirect URI matches Settings (including exact spelling).
Okta: use a Web application when LivePerson IdP sends client_secret at /token; enable PKCE on authorize. Same Client ID in this app and LP connector. Native-only apps conflict with LP secret.
Token exchange failed. Check Logcat for details.
